# Supported languages

<!-- Code generated by cmd/gen-language-artifacts; DO NOT EDIT. -->

This is the canonical supported language matrix for `codesieve`.
Other docs should link here instead of duplicating language lists.

| Name | Parser | Extensions | Extra detection |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Go (`go`) | go/parser | `.go` | - |
| Python (`python`) | tree-sitter | `.py` | - |
| Rust (`rust`) | tree-sitter | `.rs` | - |
| Zig (`zig`) | tree-sitter | `.zig` | - |
| PHP (`php`) | tree-sitter | `.php` | - |
| TypeScript / TSX (`typescript`) | tree-sitter | `.ts`, `.tsx` | - |
| JavaScript (`javascript`) | tree-sitter | `.js`, `.jsx`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` | - |
| Java (`java`) | tree-sitter | `.java` | - |
| C# (`csharp`) | tree-sitter | `.cs`, `.csx` | - |
| Terraform/OpenTofu (HCL) (`hcl`) | tree-sitter | `.tf`, `.tfvars`, `.hcl` | *.tf.json, *.tfvars.json |
| JSON (`json`) | tree-sitter | `.json` | - |
| Bash (`bash`) | tree-sitter | `.sh`, `.bash` | Also detected via bash shebang for extensionless scripts |
| YAML (`yaml`) | tree-sitter | `.yaml`, `.yml` | - |

Tree-sitter grammar sources are vendored for reproducible Nix builds.
See `docs/PARSERS.md` for layout and update workflow.
